label: 赛道样条平滑
description: 对骨架多边形顶点执行 Catmull-Rom 样条插值，输出光滑闭合中心线点序列。
description-en: Applies Catmull-Rom spline interpolation to skeleton polygon vertices, producing a smooth closed centerline point sequence.
icon: 扁平插画风格小图标。一条流畅的曲线闭合回路，曲线为亮蓝色，若干控制点标记为白色圆点，背景深色，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: skeleton
inputs.label: 骨架顶点
inputs.description: 来自 track_skeleton_generate 的闭合多边形顶点 JSON 字符串
inputs.description-en: Closed polygon vertices JSON string from track_skeleton_generate.

inputs.name: samplesPerSegment
inputs.label: 每段采样数
inputs.description: 每两个骨架顶点之间插值的采样点数，越大曲线越细腻
inputs.description-en: Number of interpolated samples between each pair of skeleton vertices.

inputs.name: tension
inputs.label: 张力系数
inputs.description: 样条张力 [0~1]，0 = 过控制点的宽松曲线，1 = 紧贴控制点的折线
inputs.description-en: Spline tension [0~1]; 0 is loose, 1 is tight.

outputs.name: centerline
outputs.label: 中心线点列
outputs.description: 平滑闭合中心线采样点 JSON 字符串 [{x,y}...]
outputs.description-en: Smooth closed centerline sample points as JSON string [{x,y}...].
